candidate: L16 NEWS-SENTIMENT cross-sectional factor FORWARD-SCAFFOLD (pre-registered + offline-validated). A genuinely new factor AXIS (text/sentiment), explicitly named in the directive (sentiment) but never opened as a track because the offline data is a LIVE SNAPSHOT only. This track pre-registers the EXACT look-ahead-safe test that would consume a historical day-stamped news/sentiment panel IF an approved fetch delivers it, validates the pipeline on synthetic data (L11 pattern), and characterizes the real news_cache snapshot to prove WHY it is not yet backtestable. Measurement/scaffold-only, committed-engine ZERO-touch, repo READ-ONLY, NO network, ASCII.
hypothesis: Cross-sectionally, BIST names with POSITIVE recent news/disclosure sentiment earn positive market-relative drift over the following days (sentiment/attention premium), and NEGATIVE-sentiment names underperform. DEPLOYABLE form: long-only TOP net-sentiment tercile in the LIQUID universe, market-relative, net of realistic round-trip cost, positive and significant with a regime-stable sign.

signal_FROZEN.definition: Per (symbol, day) net sentiment = sum of polarity over that symbol's disclosure/news items in a trailing window, polarity assigned by a PRE-REGISTERED KAP-disclosure-type lexicon (NOT a tuned ML model -> no p-hacking knob).
signal_FROZEN.text_normalization: ASCII-fold the Turkish headline (strip diacritics) before keyword matching, so the lexicon and harness stay ASCII while still matching Turkish text.
signal_FROZEN.no_price_in_signal: Sentiment uses news text only -> orthogonal to the price/volume/fundamental graveyard and to L1-L15. Genuinely new AXIS.

look_ahead_safety_FROZEN.rule: Position entered the day AFTER the news day-stamp (t+1), holding [+1,+H]; the announcement-day return is EXCLUDED. Market-relative CAR (subtract EW universe). This is the same look-ahead-safe discipline as L11 daily-PEAD.

portfolio_FROZEN.primary_gate: LIQUID long-only TOP net-sentiment tercile, market-relative, net of realistic cost

cost_FROZEN: Realistic D-207-style per-stock round-trip; report realized-cost-bps, breakeven, turnover (wired at the marked point when the real panel is present).

stats_FROZEN.nw_t: event-clustered Newey-West HAC t on the long-short CAR contributions

keep_bar_FROZEN: Deploy-edge <=> PRIMARY (LIQUID long top-sentiment tercile) market-relative net CAR > 0 AND |NW-t| >= 2.0 AND regime-sign-stable. Else SENTIMENT-NOT-TRADEABLE. SCAFFOLD stage asserts pipeline-correctness only (recovery/placebo/look-ahead), claims NO real edge.

offline_validation_FROZEN.synthetic_self_test: Plant a sentiment-conditioned post-stamp drift in synthetic returns; assert (a) RECOVERY sign-positive and |t|>=2, (b) PLACEBO (permuted polarity) |t|<2, (c) LOOK-AHEAD entry (stamp-day) leaks more than safe t+1 entry. Same three-assert harness as L11.
offline_validation_FROZEN.snapshot_characterization: Parse the real data/news_cache.json (DESCRIPTIVE only): distinct symbols, article count, date span, disclosure-type distribution, polarity-classifiable fraction -> quantify why it is NOT yet a backtestable historical panel.

honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.summary: Expect NOT-RUNNABLE offline: the only sentiment/news data present is a tiny LIVE SNAPSHOT (production sentiment-cache is empty; news_cache is a handful of symbols, ~1 month, headline-only, no historical depth, no per-day historical scores). A historical day-stamped news/sentiment panel does NOT exist offline and would require an approved network fetch + scoring pipeline. So this track CRYSTALLIZES the sentiment avenue into a pre-registered, offline-validated harness (recovers a planted effect, rejects placebo/look-ahead) and documents the exact data gap, exactly as L11 did for daily-PEAD. NO real-data edge is claimed; the real test runs only on an approved historical news fetch. The news stream is dominated by KAP special-disclosures, so a single approved KAP historical-text fetch would feed sentiment (L16), NLP-type (L17) and daily-PEAD (#1) together.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.most_likely_verdict: SCAFFOLD-SELF-TEST PASS (no deployable edge; awaiting approved historical news/disclosure fetch).
